strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks (Node.js, Dlang, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)
Strong entrepreneurial background with founder experience (GISCollective) and startup involvement (re:cinq)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML product development or recognized expertise in AI (publicly documented)
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields
Limited high-level strategic leadership experience (current role is staff engineer, not director-level)
response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical fundamentals and entrepreneurial experience but falls short on critical AI-specific qualifications. While he has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, there's no clear evidence of recognized AI expertise or strategic leadership at director level. The lack of advanced degrees or AI product development history heavily impacts fit.
